text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I'm working late into the night when a<n>sudden
knock on the door brings a<n>visitor into my office.

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Good evening! Did someone call for<n>an
acupuncturist? I'm here to give<n>your trainee's
chakra points a few<n>pokes!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Wait, she's not even here right now.<n>Welp, I
guess that makes sense since<n>it's already so
late.

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
In that case, why don't you choose a<n>treatment
option first? ☆ I'll finish up<n>her treatment by
tomorrow!
choice_data_list: I don't remember calling for an acupuncturist.

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
What's that? Do you not trust me?<n>There's
nothing to be worried about! ☆

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
I'm just going to poke a harmless<n>needle or two
into dear <chrname>!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
If the treatment is successful, the two<n>of you will
be able to achieve any<n>dreams you have! ☆

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: Not a clue! After all, I've never failed<n>before!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
...Of course, that's mostly because<n>this will be
my first time treating<n>anyone.

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Come on, I'll do the best I can! You<n>can trust me
on that, at the very least!<n>☆

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
So tell me, what aspect do you want<n>to improve
in your trainee? I'll grant<n>any wish you may have
with a little<n>poke!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: I smell danger in the air, but I figurethere might—and I emphasizemight—be a chance of gettingsomething special out of this treatment.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: What should I do?
choice_data_list: I'd like her to become stronger.
I'd like her to win races.
I'd like her health to improve.
I'd like her to become more charming.
This is too sketchy. I should quit while I still can.

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
I see, I see. So you want me to<n>activate the
strength chakra?

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
I'll do just that, then! Are you sure<n>with your
choice? There's no going<n>back after!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
All righty, just leave it to me! Look<n>forward to
tomorrow! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The next day, when <chrname> shows<n>up for
training...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Puncture Perfect!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
She's overflowing with so much<n>power she's
almost unrecognizable!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
We took a chance and it paid off! This<n>is a great
leap toward achieving our<n>goal!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Her condition is absolutely<n>deplorable...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I should've known better than to test<n>our luck.
I'm not the one suffering, yet<n>I'm full of regret.

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
I see, I see. So, you want me to<n>activate the
winning chakra?

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
I'll do just that, then! Are you sure<n>with your
choice? There's no going<n>back after!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
All righty, just leave it to me! Look<n>forward to
tomorrow! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The next day, when <chrname> shows<n>up for
training...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Puncture Perfect!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: I can sense a huge improvement in<n>her skills!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
We took a chance and it paid off! This<n>is a great
leap toward achieving our<n>goal!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Her condition is absolutely<n>deplorable...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I should've known better than to test<n>our luck.
I'm not the one suffering, yet<n>I'm full of regret.

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
I see, I see. So, you want me to<n>activate the
health chakra?

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
I'll do just that, then! Are you sure<n>with your
choice? There's no going<n>back after!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
All righty, just leave it to me! Look<n>forward to
tomorrow! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The next day, when <chrname> shows<n>up for
training...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Puncture Perfect!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Her entire body is radiating a healthy<n>glow!
She's the absolute picture of<n>health!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
We took a chance and it paid off! This<n>is a great
leap toward achieving our<n>goal!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Her condition is absolutely<n>deplorable...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I should've known better than to test<n>our luck.
I'm not the one suffering, yet<n>I'm full of regret.

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
I see, I see. So, you want me to<n>activate the
charm chakra?

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
I'll do just that, then! Are you sure<n>with your
choice? There's no going<n>back after!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
All righty, just leave it to me! Look<n>forward to
tomorrow! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The next day, when <chrname> shows<n>up for
training...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Puncture Perfect!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
She's overflowing with charm! She's<n>bound to
turn heads everywhere she<n>goes!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
We took a chance and it paid off! This<n>is a great
leap toward achieving our<n>goal!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Her condition is absolutely<n>deplorable...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I should've known better than to test<n>our luck.
I'm not the one suffering, yet<n>I'm full of regret.

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: Aw, c'mon! Don't be like that!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Sheesh, don't be so stingy! It's just<n>a harmless
needle!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, are you working overtime?<n>Oh... I didn't
know you had a visitor.

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, what awful timing! ☆ I guess<n>there's
nothing I can do here.

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: This is my cue to retreat! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
And so, the tumultuous storm leaves<n>as
suddenly as it came. I turn my<n>focus back to my
work and try to<n>forget what happened just now.

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Had a change of heart, did you? No<n>worries, it
happens!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Go ahead and tell me which chakra<n>you want me
to activate for your<n>lovely trainee!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: Geez, you still can't decide? I don't<n>have all day!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, are you working overtime?<n>Oh... I didn't
know you had a visitor.

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, what awful timing! ☆ I guess<n>there's
nothing I can do here.

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: This is my cue to retreat! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The situation takes a sharp turn<n>before I can
make a decision.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
What was that all about? I turn my<n>focus back to
my work and try to<n>forget what happened just
now.
